_comment: Acceptance baseline for scripts/acceptance.sh. Papers in `known_pass` currently emit Typst that compiles (BYETEX-attributable PASS); the gate FAILS if any of them regresses to BYETEX_FAIL. `known_fail` are the currently-open BYETEX_FAIL papers (allowed; a fix flips one and should be promoted to known_pass). Only papers whose payloads are present locally are checked, so the gate is robust to gitignored corpus payloads. Update deliberately when fixing/breaking a paper. Captured 2026-06-10 via `corpus_sweep.sh --with-oracle` (PASS 45 / BYETEX_FAIL 0; 31203 promoted after the .bbl unmatched-\makeatletter fix — the whole ByeTeX-attributable corpus now compiles).
